mechanism_claim: Under energy-matched hard negatives, compact robot execution-envelope traces recover successful futures that rank0, action-only, and object-only controls miss.
counterintuitive_observation: Object-only traces are much weaker than robot/EEF/gripper traces, and adding action statistics to state traces does not improve the selector.
claim_boundary: Supports few-shot task/contact-conditioned executable-future verification on RoboCasa365; does not support zero-shot cross-task general executability or real-robot deployment.
registry_evidence: RoboCasa365 regenerated random-position n16 hard-negative table: EEF+gripper distribution-only 63.6/64, object-only 31.0/64, action-only 28.4/64, rank0 0/64, oracle 64/64.
